name: Pydantic AI
description: Type-safe Python agent framework from the Pydantic team. Built-in MCP client, ships a sandboxed Python execution MCP server. pip install pydantic-ai. 17k stars.

skills.name: Typed Agent Definitions
skills.description: Define agents with type-validated inputs, outputs, and dependency injection using familiar Pydantic models.

skills.name: MCP Client Integration
skills.description: Connect any MCP server as a tool provider for agents with automatic schema validation and type safety.

skills.name: Sandboxed Python Execution
skills.description: Run Python code in a sandboxed MCP server (mcp-run-python) — an official server bundled with the SDK.
